name: altagama-boutique
description: Compilación y ofuscación con rutas personalizadas

scripts.clean: npx shx rm -rf dist && npx shx mkdir dist
scripts.copy:assets: npx shx mkdir -p dist/style/styles dist/components dist/views && npx shx cp main/src/index.html dist/index.html && npx shx cp main/src/style/styles.css dist/style/styles.css && npx shx cp -r main/src/style/styles/* dist/style/styles/ && npx shx cp -r main/src/assets dist/
scripts.obfuscate:root: javascript-obfuscator main/src/app.js --output dist/app.js --compact true --self-defending true --string-array true --string-array-encoding 'rc4'
scripts.obfuscate:components: javascript-obfuscator main/src/components --output dist/components --compact true --self-defending true --string-array true --string-array-encoding 'rc4'
scripts.obfuscate:views: javascript-obfuscator main/src/views --output dist/views --compact true --self-defending true --string-array true --string-array-encoding 'rc4'
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run copy:assets && npm run obfuscate:root && npm run obfuscate:components && npm run obfuscate:views

author: dozelix
